posts.author: GIC (Michael)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! We’re getting most of our leads from FB lead forms, so far I’ve been downloading excel files and importig them to the CRM which is far form ideal. I know in other CRMS there is an option for those leads to enter directly but I couldn’t find one on your platform. Please advise me on how that can be done.
